Records.description: Planar two-loop eight-point topology used as a numerical probe for IBP reduction in the 't Hooft-Veltman scheme. Two cubic internal vertices connected by three rails: middle rail $k_1-k_2$ carries no external legs; four external legs attach to the upper ($k_1$) rail and four to the lower ($k_2$) rail. 11 tHV propagators plus 6 CDR ISPs. IBP reductions with FIRE6 + LiteRed sector symmetries at a rational finite-field point. In tHV the top sector closes with 2368 masters; CDR reduction does not close at this integrand complexity. No analytic evaluation is performed in this paper.
Records.familyName: massless planar 2-loop 8-point double box with 4-4 rail split (11 propagators)
Records.location: Section 5, Eq. (5.2); IBP results in Table II. Called the planar `4-0-4' two-loop eight-point topology in the paper.

Names: massless planar 2-loop 8-point double box with 4-4 rail split (11 propagators)
